mapper.select: select id, course_id, stage_name, day_number, class_content, created_at, updated_at from sys_course_detail where id = #{id}

select id, course_id, stage_name, day_number, class_content, created_at, updated_at from sys_course_detail where course_id = #{courseId}
order by day_number is null, day_number asc, id asc
mapper.insert: insert into sys_course_detail (course_id, stage_name, day_number, class_content, created_at, updated_at) values (#{courseId}, #{stageName}, #{dayNumber}, #{classContent}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select coalesce(sum(day_number), 0) from sys_course_detail where course_id = #{courseId}
select count(1) from sys_course_detail where course_id = #{courseId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_course_detail (course_id, stage_name, day_number, class_content) values
(#{item.courseId}, #{item.stageName}, #{item.dayNumber}, #{item.classContent})
